app.name: ioquake3
app.long_description:
ioQuake3 Wii port via devkitPPC + libogc. Requires original Quake III Arena data files (pak0.pk3 – pak8.pk3) placed at sd:/quake3/baseq3/.
Controls (Wiimote sideways + Nunchuk): Nunchuk stick – Move / Strafe D-pad – Look / Turn B – Fire A – Use C – Jump Z – Crouch +/- – Next/Prev weapon HOME – Quit to HBC
